storyInfo: The dust has settled, and subtle change comes quietly to the ways and cohesive form of Kjerag's faith. Rhine Lab continues its research into the extraterrestrial object, and Elena deciphers its message with Enya's help.

attributes.content: Saintess...
attributes.name: Young Cleric

attributes.content: The clerics who followed the sinner Adso in betraying the Vine-Bead Court have all pled guilty. They are currently being kept in another one of our estates, awaiting your judgment.
attributes.name: Young Cleric

attributes.content: How do you intend to... punish them, Great Saintess...?
attributes.name: Young Cleric

attributes.content: The great hall is deserted. The seats lie bare, even though they are full most days.
Only a single young cleric sits before her, awaiting her word with bowed head.
I have heard of what happened during the unrest.
attributes.name: Enya

attributes.content: They were led astray by Adso, and did much wrong.
attributes.name: Enya

attributes.content: But I believe their hearts were always focused on defending Kjerag.
attributes.name: Enya

attributes.content: Them stepping forward to confront the intruders is atonement enough. There is no moral nor logical reason to sentence them to heavy punishment.
attributes.name: Enya

attributes.content: Have them go about the lands of the Three Clans. It is their duty to help the people complete this winter's farmwork. They are also to examine themselves, and ask how the scriptures they recite every day can be put into practice.
attributes.name: Enya

attributes.content: Once spring comes, they may return to the Court.
attributes.name: Enya

attributes.content: Yes, Your Holiness...
attributes.name: Young Cleric

attributes.content: Is there anything else?
attributes.name: Enya

attributes.content: Great Saintess... If I may be so bold as to ask you for guidance...
attributes.name: Young Cleric

attributes.content: During your Pilgrimage, did you hear Kjeragandr's will?
attributes.name: Young Cleric

attributes.content: Why do you ask?
attributes.name: Enya

attributes.content: Have you forgotten that we should not demand She show Herself?
attributes.name: Enya

attributes.content: The cleric lowers his head even further, hesitantly speaking further.
The people believe that when the Victorians invaded, She worked another miracle and scared them into retreating.
attributes.name: Young Cleric

attributes.content: I don't know why, but... I feel like it was more of a... wave goodbye...
attributes.name: Young Cleric

attributes.content: I think, maybe around the time that Catastrophe happened, Kjeragandr had already left us.
attributes.name: Young Cleric

attributes.content: If you wish to punish me for my impiety, Saintess... I will also...
attributes.name: Young Cleric

attributes.content: Matthew... You are Matthew, correct?
attributes.name: Enya

attributes.content: Can you tell me why you decided to join the Court?
attributes.name: Enya

attributes.content: When I was younger, my parents had five children to feed, and our fields were not up for the task. They decided to send me, the youngest, to the Court.
attributes.name: Young Cleric

attributes.content: They would save on having to feed one more mouth, and I would be fed by the Court as well...
attributes.name: Young Cleric

attributes.content: I studied hard, of course! I have been carefully reciting the Kjeragandr these past few years, studying all Her teachings.
attributes.name: Young Cleric

attributes.content: But I have seen Kjerag change a lot since then.
attributes.name: Young Cleric

attributes.content: There are too many things I have never heard of, things that not even the Kjeragandr can explain.
attributes.name: Young Cleric

attributes.content: I had thought that, as long as we had enough to eat and a roof over our heads to keep out the wind and snow, we would live out our days in happiness.
attributes.name: Young Cleric

attributes.content: But why is it now, when we have those things, that we become even more lost...
attributes.name: Young Cleric

attributes.content: Saintess, could it be that the people of Kjerag have strayed too far from the road She has shown us?
attributes.name: Young Cleric

attributes.content: Which led Kjeragandr to... leave us...
attributes.name: Young Cleric

attributes.content: When has Kjeragandr ever shown Her people one specific road to follow?
attributes.name: Enya

attributes.content: When the first peoples came to these mountains, using their picks to split the frozen ground and their axes to hew trees for homes, they could never have imagined...
attributes.name: Enya

attributes.content: That today, the people of this land have fixed their gazes beyond the stars.
attributes.name: Enya

attributes.content: But equally, Kjeragandr has never promised us a land of purity, eternally free from disaster.
attributes.name: Enya

attributes.content: We will face ever greater dangers, seeking our way through all kinds of trials.
attributes.name: Enya

attributes.content: Until one day, we arrive before Her, and we ask Her our questions about ourselves...
attributes.name: Enya

attributes.content: But Your Holiness, Kjeragandr is our greatest sage, our teacher, our leader... Does She truly have no commands for Her people?
attributes.name: Young Cleric

attributes.content: It is not a command, per se...
attributes.name: Enya

attributes.content: But consider for a moment. The most important wisdom Kjeragandr gave us has already been written in our scripture long ago, has it not?
attributes.name: Enya

attributes.text: Remember the path you walked, and let not yourself forget;
Fear the blizzard that has yet to come, and let not yourself be arrogant;
Clutch your bows and arrows, pickaxes and hoes tight, and let not yourself be careless;
Love your brothers and sisters, love your neighbors and friends, and love the rocks and hills, the grass and trees, as you would love your own siblings.
Heed these words, and no calamity shall prevail over you, and your home and hearth will be safe forever more.

attributes.content: Still busy, Elena?
attributes.name: Silence

attributes.content: Director Silence?
attributes.name: Elena

attributes.content: I heard you're still handling the observation data from before. Hope I'm not disturbing you.
attributes.name: Silence

attributes.content: I'm recalculating my models using the data I got on Mount Karlan.
attributes.name: Elena

attributes.content: If all goes well, we should be able to get the precise location of where that extraterrestrial object fell on Kjerag. It beats running across the mountains looking for it.
attributes.name: Elena

attributes.content: This is a major discovery, and it's all thanks to your courage and determination. You've done well, Elena.
attributes.name: Silence

attributes.content: You don't need to praise me for doing my job, Director, it's kinda embarrassing...
attributes.name: Elena

attributes.content: Oh, right, heard anything new about Carolin?
attributes.name: Elena

attributes.content: (Shakes head)
attributes.name: Silence

attributes.content: We still haven't managed to find her, but our investigation over the last few days found a lot of definitive proof that she was in Kjerag as a spy.
attributes.name: Silence

attributes.content: I'm sorry, but we have to admit... those accusations against her were true.
attributes.name: Silence

attributes.content: I remember the time I worked with her. Her face whenever she talked about the sky... I don't think you can fake that sort of passion.
attributes.name: Elena

attributes.content: I don't understand why she would...
attributes.name: Elena

attributes.content: 'Ideals' and 'future' are beautiful words, weightless and romantic, without form or substance.
attributes.name: Silence

attributes.content: But the people who are the vectors of those concepts... They are still weighed down by the gravity of reality.
attributes.name: Silence

attributes.content: I hope that one day, you'll have the chance to ask her yourself.
attributes.name: Silence

attributes.content: Ah, I almost forgot. I read your report.
attributes.name: Silence

attributes.content: Core nation academics could never get past the theoretical stage when discussing Feranmuts, since they never found any real proof of them.
attributes.name: Silence

attributes.content: Most people write those creatures off as mystical mumbo-jumbo.
attributes.name: Silence

attributes.content: But now, you managed to find actual Feranmut biosignatures in Kjerag. These incredibly rare observation data might even lead to a massive breakthrough.
attributes.name: Silence

attributes.content: It will be a significant step forward for you to be the one to publish this discovery.
attributes.name: Silence

attributes.content: Thanks, Director.
attributes.name: Elena

attributes.content: But... I don't really have plans to publish it at the moment.
attributes.name: Elena

attributes.content: Oh? Is there something else you're worried about?
attributes.name: Silence

attributes.content: I... Oh, forget it!
attributes.name: Elena

attributes.content: Leaving aside the fact that this was a complete coincidence and I only stumbled across this stuff with the help of two friends, I haven't discovered anything amazing at all!
attributes.name: Elena

attributes.content: Besides, our current understanding of Feranmuts can barely even be considered superficial. I can't imagine publishing this would bring about anything except even more of a headache for Kjerag...
attributes.name: Elena

attributes.content: If a thirst for knowledge is a scientist's greatest friend, then a thirst for quick results is their greatest enemy.
attributes.name: Elena

attributes.content: Eagerness for success, eagerness for leaving behind your name in the books, even eagerness for an answer, something to prove you're on the right track.
attributes.name: Elena

attributes.content: But I won't rush things this time.
attributes.name: Elena

attributes.content: I'm not in a hurry to prove myself to anyone. If I'm wrong, then I'm wrong.
attributes.name: Elena

attributes.content: The people of the past made lots of mistakes as they explored Terra. Why do I need to try and be a 'wise woman' who hasn't made any?
attributes.name: Elena

attributes.content: I've still got plenty of time. Before I head off, I need to recognize that I don't know a thing about Terra.
attributes.name: Elena

attributes.content: An impressive outlook... I respect your choice.
attributes.name: Silence

attributes.content: Oh, shucks, I'm not impressive at all...
attributes.name: Elena

attributes.content: Honestly, I just want more time to make sure this survey is the best it can be. This way, I won't make a fool of myself publishing a half-baked paper—
attributes.name: Elena

attributes.content: Oh! The calculations are done... Got it!
attributes.name: Elena

attributes.content: We'll find it at...
attributes.name: Elena

attributes.content: Is he still not back yet?
attributes.name: Degenbrecher

attributes.content: I thought you still had some recuperating to do before you could get out of bed.
attributes.name: Gnosis

attributes.content: No need to worry about me. You don't know a thing about a warrior's mettle.
attributes.name: Degenbrecher

attributes.content: It seems he had his way in the end.
attributes.name: Degenbrecher

attributes.content: The two of them look around. The vast office feels more spacious than ever, much of its former decor having just been moved out. Their conversation echoes slightly in the empty space.
Hardly the first time.
attributes.name: Gnosis

attributes.content: I was curious to see how he planned to clean up this mess he left behind.
attributes.name: Degenbrecher

attributes.content: But it seems the plan was to just dump it all on you.
attributes.name: Degenbrecher

attributes.content: It sounds like you have your complaints about him as well.
attributes.name: Gnosis

attributes.content: Would you believe me if I said I am fighting on your behalf?
attributes.name: Degenbrecher

attributes.content: I never actually expected him to return.
attributes.name: Gnosis

attributes.content: It's the same story every time. He always has his ways of getting everyone to do what he wants... Whether they're his enemies, or friends and family.
attributes.name: Gnosis

attributes.content: Never caring what others think, always making his own schemes, giving tasks nobody wants to do to the people around him...
attributes.name: Gnosis

attributes.content: ...Then shouldering the hardest part himself.
attributes.name: Gnosis

attributes.content: You're the last one still putting in a good word for him.
attributes.name: Degenbrecher

attributes.content: In moments like these, I can only understand Enya and Ensia's urge to slam his head against the ground.
attributes.name: Degenbrecher

attributes.content: Alright, enough grumbling now.
attributes.name: Gnosis

attributes.content: Moving on then. There's only one set of shoulders the heavy responsibility of handling Karlan Trade can fall on now. Do your best... Chairman Edelweiss.
attributes.name: Degenbrecher

attributes.content: I wish you the very best in your new position.
attributes.name: Degenbrecher

attributes.content: I thank you for your kindness.
attributes.name: Gnosis

attributes.content: But I am currently considering creating a special position for the Black Knight.
attributes.name: Gnosis

attributes.content: Director of Public Relations, perhaps, or maybe a brand ambassador, things like that. Just know that it won't be light work.
attributes.name: Gnosis

attributes.content: Alright. Defeat me, and I'll take the job. Right here, right now.
attributes.name: Degenbrecher

attributes.content: ...I forfeit.
attributes.name: Gnosis

attributes.content: Nothing you can do about it, then.
attributes.name: Degenbrecher

attributes.content: Take care now, Chairman Gnosis.
attributes.name: Degenbrecher

attributes.content: Wait, Degenbrecher.
attributes.name: Gnosis

attributes.content: ...Are you going to leave?
attributes.name: Gnosis

attributes.content: I know not everything happening right now is as he promised.
attributes.name: Gnosis

attributes.content: 'Making Kjerag big enough for the both of us'. That's what he said.
attributes.name: Gnosis

attributes.content: While the stage he set for us is hardly small, what he asks us to do is not as we first intended.
attributes.name: Gnosis

attributes.content: So if you're feeling weary of all this—
attributes.name: Gnosis

attributes.content: Time flies. I've been working for him for a while now, now that I think about it.
attributes.name: Degenbrecher

attributes.content: Enjoying myself? Hardly. Feeling weary? I would not go that far.
attributes.name: Degenbrecher

attributes.content: But there was one thing off about your little speech.
attributes.name: Degenbrecher

attributes.content: The ones standing in this room are not Enciodes's subordinates or attendants, and are certainly not cubs that need his care.
attributes.name: Degenbrecher

attributes.content: We were never waiting for him to create something for us, nor were we expecting something in return from him.
attributes.name: Degenbrecher

attributes.content: We each walk our own roads, roads that just happened to go the same way for a while.
attributes.name: Degenbrecher

attributes.content: So if there is anything you really can't get done without me, come find me.
attributes.name: Degenbrecher

attributes.content: Hah...
attributes.name: Gnosis

attributes.content: But there is one thing I will not compromise on.
attributes.name: Degenbrecher

attributes.content: No promotion ceremonies.
attributes.name: Degenbrecher

attributes.content: So, we finally get the chance to meet.
attributes.name: Friendly, Polite Man

attributes.content: Mr. Silverash.
attributes.name: Friendly, Polite Man

attributes.content: I am truly honored to receive you in person. I hope your trip to the Snow Realm has been smooth so far.
attributes.name: Enciodes

attributes.content: Smoother than silk, aside from my secretary banning me from skiing. That one's a mighty shame.
attributes.name: Jackson

attributes.content: First of all, I'd like to thank you.
attributes.name: Jackson

attributes.content: When I was talking with our scientists, they all gave rave reviews when it came to Karlan Trade providing them a safe working environment in Kjerag.
attributes.name: Jackson

attributes.content: Whether it's making sure the observation station was supplied during the Catastrophe or protecting the scientists during the unrest, Kjerag has shown the responsibility a modern civilization should have.
attributes.name: Jackson

attributes.content: Rhine Lab's preliminary work in Kjerag is going smoothly, and you and your team deserve some recognition.
attributes.name: Jackson

attributes.content: We were merely doing our jobs.
attributes.name: Enciodes

attributes.content: I hope this will make you believe just how much our cooperation with Columbia means to us.
attributes.name: Enciodes

attributes.content: Kjerag has made our preparations. We will do all we can so that when the next Terra-shaking wave strikes, we can seize the opportunity.
attributes.name: Enciodes

attributes.content: 'Future'. It's a word that really captivates people.
attributes.name: Jackson

attributes.content: From a certain point of view, Columbia and Kjerag are both 'young' nations.
attributes.name: Jackson

attributes.content: I believe there are times that youth isn't such a bad thing.
attributes.name: Jackson

attributes.content: Because it's the young who have the courage and energy to embrace the future one step ahead of the others.
attributes.name: Jackson

attributes.content: Oh, right, on my way to Kjerag, I heard about a little incident that really surprised me.
attributes.name: Jackson

attributes.content: I hear your Kjerag had a little 'friction' with Victoria's Duke of Caster a few days ago.
attributes.name: Jackson

attributes.content: So I wanted to ask: do you think Victoria is a credible threat to Kjerag, and to the safety of Rhine Lab?
attributes.name: Jackson

attributes.content: Please believe me when I say that Columbia is willing and able to work alongside Kjerag to preserve the international order among the core nations.
attributes.name: Jackson

attributes.content: If you're interested—
attributes.name: Jackson

attributes.content: I thank you for your kindness, Mr. Vice-President.
attributes.name: Enciodes

attributes.content: Victoria is our neighbor, and they have always kept a close watch on Kjerag's development. On this one point, they are the same as Columbia.
attributes.name: Enciodes

attributes.content: Oh, I hope that's not meant to be criticism.
attributes.name: Jackson

attributes.content: Haha. Since competition and friction are unavoidable, Kjerag has no intention of complicating such matters.
attributes.name: Enciodes

attributes.content: What I hope for more is to be able to have an open and sincere dialog between us.
attributes.name: Enciodes

attributes.content: This ancient land of Kjerag still has many mysteries that urgently need resolving. We must keep in mind that this is the very reason we are seeking cooperation.
attributes.name: Enciodes

attributes.content: History and religion, ancient mysteries full of charm...
attributes.name: Jackson

attributes.content: One of the rumors I heard said the Duke called the retreat because she saw Kjerag's protector god, Kjeragandr, work a 'miracle' at a pivotal moment.
attributes.name: Jackson

attributes.content: The Duke of Caster is a shrewd politician. A mere miracle would not sway her, I'm afraid.
attributes.name: Enciodes

attributes.content: It is simply that she realized if she wanted to achieve her political goals in Kjerag, she would have to pay a much higher price than she anticipated. This is why she abandoned the idea of making us her foe.
attributes.name: Enciodes

attributes.content: A brilliant gambit, I must say... But in the eyes of others, this is also a signal.
attributes.name: Jackson

attributes.content: Within the landscape of the core nations, a new state has risen—and Kjerag stands ready for the next round of competition, which will be crueler than ever.
attributes.name: Jackson

attributes.content: Do you think this is what you intended?
attributes.name: Jackson

attributes.content: Rather than saying this is any one person's desire, I would rather say it is the inevitable outcome.
attributes.name: Enciodes

attributes.content: Terra cannot give Kjerag the time we need to develop, and since competition and conflict are unavoidable, showing our neighbors our determination is not necessarily bad.
attributes.name: Enciodes

attributes.content: It will let them know that Kjerag will not give up the chase simply because we have lagged behind a moment, nor will we lose heart in defending our interests because of a lack of military power.
attributes.name: Enciodes

attributes.content: Through competition, advance development. Amidst conflict, seek peace. This is Kjerag's choice.
attributes.name: Enciodes

attributes.content: You sure are something, Mr. Silverash. You're like a seasoned statesman when it comes to all sorts of things.
attributes.name: Jackson

attributes.content: Might be a bit bold, but would you mind one last question?
attributes.name: Jackson

attributes.content: You've resigned your position as Chairman of Karlan Trade, and you've maintained the legitimacy of the Vine-Bead Court in Kjerag. What would you say your role in the country is?
attributes.name: Jackson

attributes.content: A determined, proactive reformer, or a powerful warlord, or maybe the true power behind Kjerag, hidden in the shadows?
attributes.name: Jackson

attributes.content: I am afraid this is not a question I can answer for you, Mr. Vice-President.
attributes.name: Enciodes

attributes.content: When people in the distant future discuss this period of history, see if they still remember the Silverash name.
attributes.name: Enciodes

attributes.content: I hope they will see the name as one of the countless stones forming the foundation of Kjerag's ascent into the coming era.
attributes.name: Enciodes

attributes.content: The manse is deserted.
All is arranged as it was, yet shines as if new. Standing here once more brings only the sense of a lifetime having passed by.
Master? You've returned.
attributes.name: Chester

attributes.content: I have.
attributes.name: Enciodes

attributes.content: Are my sisters not here?
attributes.name: Enciodes

attributes.content: *sigh* The young mistresses were unaware you would be returning today. If I had known, I would have asked them to stay. How long has it been since you last had a meal together—
attributes.name: Chester

attributes.content: No need to trouble yourself. There will always be time later.
attributes.name: Enciodes

attributes.content: I think I shall take a little break today. It has been a long while since my last.
attributes.name: Enciodes

attributes.content: Then I am afraid I shall have to trouble you with another matter. As it so happens, you have just received a telephone call.
attributes.name: Chester

attributes.content: Is it a telephone? Or one of those 'long-distance information transfer'... One of those new-fangled Columbian toys. Would you be receiving it now?
attributes.name: Chester

attributes.content: Connect me.
attributes.name: Enciodes

attributes.content: Ah, yes, I thought it might be you.
attributes.name: Enciodes

attributes.content: All is well here, thanks to your aid with the prior matter. It was of highest importance to Kjerag.
attributes.name: Enciodes

attributes.content: A victory? I don't believe we should call it that.
attributes.name: Enciodes

attributes.content: Our patient set-up and long-term build-up are receiving the outcome they deserve, nothing more.
attributes.name: Enciodes

attributes.content: Save your suspense over victory or defeat for the next time we meet across the board.
attributes.name: Enciodes

attributes.content: Surface temperature, 17.8 degrees, stable.
attributes.name: Kjerag Researcher A

attributes.content: Radioactivity index, 97.5, stable.
attributes.name: Kjerag Researcher A

attributes.content: All indices within safe limits. Target is stable. Proceed with sampling.
attributes.name: Kjerag Researcher B

attributes.content: By Kjeragandr... This really is something that fell from outer space. Didn't think we'd get to see it for ourselves.
attributes.name: Kjerag Researcher B

attributes.content: By Kjeragandr indeed... Our Kjerag's been changing a little too fast, I feel like.
attributes.name: Kjerag Researcher A

attributes.content: Hello? Elena, can you hear me?
attributes.name: Muelsyse

attributes.content: How're you doing in there? Hunky-dory?
attributes.name: Muelsyse

attributes.content: Ah... I don't... feel too great, honestly. This new model of power armor... Still not too used to it.
attributes.name: Elena

attributes.content: Everything's gone dark in here, I think I might have hit a power switch or something by accident... Wait, it's you, Director Muelsyse! You're blocking the camera!
attributes.name: Elena

attributes.content: Oopsies sorries!
attributes.name: Muelsyse

attributes.content: Look, there's no need to be so nervous, most of the armor's functions are automated. Just imagine you're wearing a nice, thick hazmat suit.
attributes.name: Muelsyse

attributes.content: Also, Nasti promised me this model has a hundred-percent reliable emergency eject function. It'll shoot you out to safety the moment it smells trouble.
attributes.name: Muelsyse

attributes.content: It'll shoot me out?! What if I go too high or something—
attributes.name: Elena

attributes.content: No, this really isn't the time to worry about that.
attributes.name: Elena

attributes.content: Seriously, relax a little. This is your career's big moment, y'know, you should be enjoying it.
attributes.name: Muelsyse

attributes.content: Alrighty then, all ready?
attributes.name: Muelsyse

attributes.content: I've gotten this far...
attributes.name: Elena

attributes.content: Alright! Let's do this!
attributes.name: Elena

attributes.content: Deep within the mountains hides a clearing rarely set foot in by man.
The mysterious object that fell from the heavens lies in the center of the clearing. Surrounding it are countless probes and sensors, like some ancient altar.
Elena slowly moves the power armor forwards.
She can sense countless eyes boring holes into her even through the cockpit. Everyone awaits this historic first contact.
The irregular indigo object is right in front of her. Elena takes a few deep breaths, then slowly stretches out her hands.
The robotic arms make contact with it.
There is no explosion, or flash of light, or unexpected activity. It is like an ordinary handshake.
As gentle as a snowflake falling to the ground.
We've got the preliminary analysis of the sample, Chief Urbica.
attributes.name: Rhine Lab Researcher

attributes.content: What's it say?!
attributes.name: Elena

attributes.content: The results are really surprising...
attributes.name: Rhine Lab Researcher

attributes.content: We have no idea what seventy percent of its composition is. It's not any sort of material known to man.
attributes.name: Rhine Lab Researcher

attributes.content: But it seems like its structure has been severely damaged.
attributes.name: Rhine Lab Researcher

attributes.content: As for the remaining thirty percent, we're sure that...
attributes.name: Rhine Lab Researcher

attributes.content: There is fundamentally no difference between its main component and the somatic cells of Terra's Elves.
attributes.name: Rhine Lab Researcher

attributes.content: Did you say... Elves?
attributes.name: Muelsyse

attributes.content: But why... would Elves come from outer space...?
attributes.name: Muelsyse

attributes.content: It might be completely unimaginable, but based on what we've seen from the sample, the conclusion is clear.
attributes.name: Rhine Lab Researcher

attributes.content: If we're sure that this part of it is just like an Elf... then wouldn't the damage to its structure mean that it ran into some sort of danger before it fell...?
attributes.name: Elena

attributes.content: So this is the 'meteorite' you were looking for?
attributes.name: Enya

attributes.content: En—Saintess, what are you doing here?
attributes.name: Elena

attributes.content: Shh! Not too loud...
attributes.name: Enya

attributes.content: I snuck out of the Court. I could hardly miss the chance to see our guest from beyond the sky up close.
attributes.name: Enya

attributes.content: It seems... rather more dangerous than I imagined?
attributes.name: Enya

attributes.content: Unknown objects always have a certain amount of danger.
attributes.name: Elena

attributes.content: Its fall onto Kjerag, was it pure coincidence, or some sort of unexpected factor? Or to put it in another way, what sort of causal relationship does it have with Kjeragandr's dormancy...?
attributes.name: Elena

attributes.content: Right now, we don't even know where to start with our research.
attributes.name: Elena

attributes.content: The life of a scientist is bitter work indeed.
attributes.name: Enya

attributes.content: Oh? What is this screen for...?
attributes.name: Enya

attributes.content: That's a sonographic imager.
attributes.name: Elena

attributes.content: Based on our observations, this unknown object is constantly sending out a type of infrasonic wave.
attributes.name: Elena

attributes.content: It's very regular, always repeating across the same frequency band.
attributes.name: Elena

attributes.content: How curious... If it weren't for your explanation, I would have thought it was some kind of writing.
attributes.name: Enya

attributes.content: Writing...?
attributes.name: Elena

attributes.content: The shape of this frequency closely resembles ancient Kjerag symbols that were used to transmit information.
attributes.name: Enya

attributes.content: It's very simple, with an extremely limited vocabulary. It's mostly carved on rocks or trees, to inform your friends of the prey's location, or the movements of a fierce beast, that sort of information.
attributes.name: Enya

attributes.content: Hmm... The similarities are striking, now that I think more about it.
attributes.name: Enya

attributes.content: Enya! Can you read this language? Could you translate it?
attributes.name: Elena

attributes.content: Only somewhat. If you want to decipher it, I'll have to go back to the Hall of Writings to find Memory and Symbols—
attributes.name: Enya

attributes.content: I've got it here!
attributes.name: Elena

attributes.content: Huh?
attributes.name: Enya

attributes.content: When I snuck into the Vine-Bead Court, I scanned all the books they let you borrow the whole way through with my terminal, just in case... Aha, here!
attributes.name: Elena

attributes.content: I didn't think you would...
attributes.name: Enya

attributes.content: I'm begging you, Enya, please!
attributes.name: Elena

attributes.content: Alright... I'll give it a try.
attributes.name: Enya

attributes.content: Enya takes the terminal from Elena, and with some guidance, she finds the relevant text.
She looks at the diagrams in the ancient tome, writing out her translation in the snow with her finger.
